settings.title: Your privacy matters
settings.body:
Moon Style Apparel (MSA) respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal information.

We collect information you provide when placing orders, creating an account, subscribing to our newsletter, or contacting us. This may include your name, email address, shipping address, and payment details.

We use this information to process orders, communicate with you, improve our services, and comply with legal obligations. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.

For questions about this policy, please contact us.
